def positive_parallel_lists_used_instead_of_record_object():
    rule_id = "parallel_lists_used_instead_of_record_object"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that keeps related values synchronized across multiple lists instead of using one record type."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
